job.title: Mainframe Cobol Developer
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: Move2Cloud is recruiting a Mainframe COBOL Developer in Lyon to work on the legacy systems of our major enterprise clients. You contribute to the maintenance and modernisation of critical applications.
mission.1: Développer et maintenir des programmes COBOL sur environnement z/OS
mission.2: Analyse and fix anomalies on mainframe applications
mission.3: Participer aux projets de migration et de modernisation
profile.2: 2 to 6 years of experience COBOL / mainframe
profile.3: Proficiency in COBOL, JCL, CICS, DB2
profile.5: Rigueur, fiabilité et sens du service
